home.title: FanaticExplorer — Python Developer Portfolio
home.description: Python developer focused on bots, parsing, and automation. Portfolio with featured projects, orders, and fast ways to get in touch. Based in Europe.

projects.title: Projects — Bots, Utilities, Web Tools
projects.description: Browse a curated set of bots, utilities, web tools, and study projects with tech stacks, GitHub links, and concise outcomes. Filter by category, see highlights.

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Selected orders with briefs, reviews, and tech stacks, showing practical automation and bot solutions delivered for clients. Across Telegram and web.

contact.title: Contact — Send a Project Request
contact.description: Send a project request, share task details, and choose a preferred contact method such as Telegram, GitHub, X, or email. Fast reply and clear next steps.

notFound.title: Page Not Found — FanaticExplorer
notFound.description: The requested page could not be found. Use the navigation to return home, view projects, or reach out directly. You can also switch language. Need help? Contact

hero.subtitle: Creating bots and automation in Python — removing manual work, saving time.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Built for fun. Open-sourced for you.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Real clients. Real problems. Real solutions.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Started as ideas. Ended up as working solutions.

super-role-manager.title: SuperRoleManager
super-role-manager.description: Configurable Discord bot for managing self-assignable roles. Roles are defined in a YAML file, supports single- and multi-select categories, buttons with current state, and hot reloading the config without restarting the bot.

emojies-parser.title: EmojiesParser
emojies-parser.description: Tool for bulk downloading emojis and stickers from public Discord servers. Supports both static and animated emojis, collects metadata, and organizes results into JSON and folders.

myinstantsapi-py.title: MyinstantsAPI-py
myinstantsapi-py.description: Unofficial FastAPI client for MyInstants. Lets you search sounds by keywords, fetch trends, recently added sounds, and details for specific audio. Works via web scraping.

window-manager.title: WindowManager
window-manager.description: Lightweight utility for managing Windows windows from the command line. Supports listing windows, checking whether they are running, minimizing, and activating the target window. Includes a compiled binary via Nuitka.

sayclip-legacy.title: SayClip-legacy
sayclip-legacy.description: WebView app for speech-to-text using Whisper. Visualizes audio, uses VAD, and lets you define instructions to polish the text.

lifehack-hub.title: LifehackHub
lifehack-hub.description: Semester project for the "Frontend Technologies" course. SPA with a collection of productivity lifehacks. Lifehacks are stored in JSON. Supports filtering by category, viewing details, and saving favorites.

genius-cleaner.title: GeniusCleaner
genius-cleaner.description: Published Firefox extension that cleans Genius.com pages from annotations, popups, and highlights, leaving only lyrics. Works with scrolling and dynamic content loading.

pear-cleaner.title: PearCleaner
pear-cleaner.description: Online generator of custom CSS styles for the Pear Desktop web app, letting users hide unwanted UI elements in YouTube Music such as mood chips, social buttons, menu items, and more.

recording-converter.title: RecordingConverter
recording-converter.description: Advanced OBS Studio plugin that automates conversion of recordings and replays into multiple formats via FFmpeg. Supports many formats, custom parameters, and optional deletion of originals.

uni-nfl-fantasy-dwh.title: uni-nfl-fantasy-dwh
uni-nfl-fantasy-dwh.description: Study project building a Data Warehouse using the Kimball methodology on an NFL Fantasy Football dataset in Snowflake. Implements a star schema with SCD Type 2 and analytical queries for player ranking and fantasy points.

easymsgbox.title: easymsgbox
easymsgbox.description: Compact library published on PyPI that simplifies creating standard dialog windows (info, warning, error).

lrc-discord-sync.title: LRCDiscordSync
lrc-discord-sync.description: Utility to sync the current song lyrics to Discord status. Updates the user status in real time based on lines from an LRC file. Uses a user token; intended for educational use only.

nti.title: NTI
nti.description: Full-stack platform for the NTI educational institution. Two programme tracks — grant incubation and live practice placement — covering applications, onboarding, project tracking, and reporting. Handles 9 user roles, notifications, dashboards, and a public CMS.

askd.title: askd
askd.description: MCP server that gives coding agents a GUI for asking you questions. Built with Go + Wails v3, lives in the system tray, and supports multi-select, free-form input, and desktop notifications.

discord-webhook-mcp.title: discord-webhook-mcp
discord-webhook-mcp.description: MCP server for sending messages to Discord via webhooks. Supports text, embeds, polls, files, link buttons, and forum threads.

curtains.title: curtains
curtains.description: Tiny TUI for force-killing Windows processes. Shows only real application windows, skips background and system processes — single portable binary.

win-orchestra.title: WinOrchestra
win-orchestra.description: CLI tool for controlling Windows windows — list, focus, minimize, close. Go rewrite of WindowManager using Cobra + Win32 API for compact binaries and JSON output.

telegram-channel-parse.title: Telegram channel parsing
telegram-channel-parse.description: Script that, by Telegram channel ID, determined its username and name.
telegram-channel-parse.review: Competent specialist. Master of his craft. I'll know who to contact next time.

discord-account-checker.title: Discord server account checker
discord-account-checker.description: Python CLI app for bulk checking whether accounts exist on a specified Discord server, with clean code and error handling.
discord-account-checker.review: The checker works, the task was completed successfully. Recommended!

telegram-neuro-commentator.title: Neuro-commentator for Telegram posts
telegram-neuro-commentator.description: Telegram userbot on Pyrogram + OpenAI that automatically commented on new posts with a natural tone and light promotion.
telegram-neuro-commentator.review: Great specialist. Responsible, always in touch. Very satisfied with the cooperation. Recommended.

reddit-autoposter.title: Reddit autoposter / activity boosting
reddit-autoposter.description: Automated Reddit posting via PRAW with a spreadsheet binding plus scheduled upvote boosting through an external API.
reddit-autoposter.review: Thank you for the professional and prompt work! I especially appreciate the great communication and speed. Recommended for collaboration!

python-cgi-flask.title: Python CGI app enhancements
python-cgi-flask.description: Migration of a local CGI project to Flask with subsequent deployment to PythonAnywhere.
python-cgi-flask.review: Awesome work, everything done in detail.

account-registration-script.title: Account registration script
account-registration-script.description: Built a script for mass account creation without captchas, with intelligent IP management and data filling.
account-registration-script.review: Thanks for the work, a good specialist.

binance-auth-bypass.title: Parsing Binance page with auth bypass
binance-auth-bypass.description: Reverse-engineering the Binance Futures Leaderboard page. Implemented parsing without authentication by analyzing API requests (REST API in DevTools).
binance-auth-bypass.review: I will always work with Andriy now. He did what other clients said was impossible. Completed everything quickly and with high quality, highly recommended.

telegram-chatgpt-userbot.title: Realistic ChatGPT companion userbot
telegram-chatgpt-userbot.description: Advanced Telegram userbot on Pyrogram + GPT that held conversations like a real person with human-like action emulation and consulted about company services.

binance-two-sessions.title: Bypassing limits and running two Binance sessions
binance-two-sessions.description: Find a way to use one Binance session on multiple devices — solution via cookies and transferring them.

automation-mailing.title: Automated outreach on low-traffic websites
automation-mailing.description: Playwright + Flet app for automating messaging on different websites. Delivered a convenient Flutter-based interface for the client.
automation-mailing.review: Great communication. Happy with the collaboration.

run-script.title: Script run
run-script.description: Urgent launch of a ready program on the client's server after the previous contractor disappeared.
run-script.review: Recommended. Writes to the point, works fast.

telegram-captcha-free-groups.title: Bot for finding captcha-free groups
telegram-captcha-free-groups.description: Automated search for Telegram groups and channels for outreach. Filtering via GPT to exclude groups with captchas.
telegram-captcha-free-groups.review: A star task, but the order was completed successfully. Thank you.
